scripts.build: npm run build -w @melody/shared && npm run build -w @melody/worker && npm run build -w @melody/api && npm run build -w @melody/web
scripts.lint: prettier --check package.json package-lock.json devx.config.mjs lint-staged.config.cjs commitlint.config.cjs .prettierrc.cjs .ncurc.cjs README.md packages/*/package.json
scripts.lint:fix: prettier --write package.json package-lock.json devx.config.mjs lint-staged.config.cjs commitlint.config.cjs .prettierrc.cjs .ncurc.cjs README.md packages/*/package.json
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @melody/shared && npm run typecheck -w @melody/worker && npm run typecheck -w @melody/api && npm run typecheck -w @melody/web
